package.name: minicar_client
package.description: R-37 spike: parameterized micro-ROS host client (pub + sub) modeling one Yahboom minicar. ROS namespace and XRCE-DDS client_key are argv-controlled so the spike can force a multi-client session collision or keep clients distinct. Pub/sub only — no services (keeps the dependency closure off the Jazzy service-introspection breakage).
